---
title: "Writing-up"
---

```{r echo=FALSE}
# Solutions
SHOW_SOLS = TRUE
source("assets/dropdowns.R")

# Chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    message = FALSE, 
    warning = FALSE, 
    fig.align = 'center',
    out.width = '60%'
)

# ggplot settings
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(
  theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
)

# reproducibility
set.seed(953)
```

:::red
**PRE-LAB ACTIVITIES**

Before attempting the lab please read ?.
:::

:::lo
**LEARNING OBJECTIVES**


:::
